types.description: Agents can be (Super) Admin, Owners, Directors, Conductors, Developers, Editors, Authors, Members, and Public. Each should have an email and password, first and last name, full name, role, and access privileges.

ecosystems.name: WorldLink
ecosystems.description: An entity, both corporate and non-profit, engaged in creating curriculum as software, as educational resources, and as in-person classroom facilitation, for creative agency and regenerative living.

ecosystems.name: Builders Collective
ecosystems.description: Exploring how we imagine, design, and build the future together—to build creative agency, empathic resilience, and regenerative harmony. We are building a loving world.

domains.description: Visualizing a world in change: by bringing together maps, globes, and interactive tools, Story.Earth deepens an understanding of Earth system science and inspires planetary stewardship.

domains.name: Nourish
domains.description: Nourish is an educational initiative designed to open a meaningful conversation about food, health, and sustainability.
